text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Item code pattern (configurable): DEPARTMENT/SEGMENT_CODE/SUB_SEGMENT_CODE/RUNNING_NUMBER e.g. ME/SG/SSG/000001. runningNumber = 6-digit zero-padded, max+1 from existing codes (0 if none), generated transactionally (race-safe); uniqueness on (runningNumber, code).

Dept codes {ME|EL|AD|CP|SR|IT}, fallback DEP; segment/sub-segment default SG/SSG. description auto-populated = segmentDesc + subSegmentDesc + shortDescription, fallback to item code. ItemSourcePriority: sourceType in

{MANUFACTURED|PURCHASED|SUBCONTRACTED|STOCK_TRANSFER}, unique (itemId, priority) and (itemId, sourceType), replaced as a set on update. HS code optional (import duty classification). standardSupplier need NOT be ONBOARDED (any id or null accepted).

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0; stroke: white; stroke-width: 15px;
stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: none; stroke-width: 2px; fill: none;

path.style: fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px;

text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Three creation paths converge on one lifecycle (PENDING_ONBOARDING

-> PENDING_APPROVAL -> ONBOARDED -> OFFBOARDED, plus SUSPENDED): single (form), implicit (auto-create from a non-UUID requisition line itemId, no lookup, description = string, UoM from line), bulk (import). Lifecycle rules mirror suppliers: request-approval guard status

=PENDING_ONBOARDING; approve guard status=PENDING_APPROVAL; offboard guard status=ONBOARDED; edit reverts ONBOARDED/PENDING_APPROVAL to PENDING_APPROVAL with isErpSynced reset; ERP-sync toggle only when ONBOARDED; ITEM_APPROVAL_REQUESTED
notification only at request-approval; item audit under category ADMIN. Bulk = exact header, accumulate all errors, all-or-nothing, upsert by code, every standardSupplierCode must resolve.
